payload.reason: Zero battery-herding overvoltage breaches detected under the priority-based coordination protocol. The Coordinator eliminates herding overvoltage while a disclosed residual of 435 far-feeder undervoltage events remains (known tuning target). Dispatch plan approved.

payload.compliance_reason: Zero battery-herding overvoltage breaches detected under the gossip dispatch strategy. Gossip coordination successfully desynchronised the fleet and kept every node within the voltage band. Dispatch plan approved.
